string 2:
Oh, look who it is. Well, guess what? I found somebody way
better than the likes of you!
Hehehe...! Master, please! You're embarrassing me!

This is the one who brought me a Parrotmon feather. Pretty
impressive, right?
{next}Way to go, Solarmon.
{next}Long time no see, Hagurumon.
{end}Okay. So long!

Y-Yeah... Easy peasy for someone of my skill.
...Don't you say anything funny, okay?

I keep telling you, I'm not Hagurumon!
I'm Solarmon! And don't you forget it!

Hey. My master's not done talking to you.
If you're busy, free yourself up and come back!

Oh, it's you again. Lemme guess.
Ya wanna hear what we have to say?
{next}Yes, tell me more.
{end}I'm busy right now. Maybe some other time.

I suppose yer feelin' pretty worthless at the moment, eh?
Okay, I'll fill ya in.

Aww, and here I was gonna give ya a break.
Well, hurry back when yer done!

I'm gonna give ya a chance to redeem yerself.
Ya know, 'cuz I'm a nice guy.

We're about to go get the jewelry in the underground.
You can come if ya wanna help.

But if ya wait too long, we'll make off with it all.
Best join us while ya still can!

H-Hey! Get a move on! We're talkin' about
PlatinumNumemon! This is our big break!

Uh... I'll leave this one to you, Big Bro!
Show us yer stuff!
Solarmon, you handle this!

N-No way! You see how strong that thing looks?
It's way outta my league!
{next}Let's try attacking.
{next}Maybe one of us can act as bait?
{next}Let's try poking it.

What?! L-Listen. You're the one who said it, so you better
be the one to do the attacking.

Hey, that's a good idea! And since it was your suggestion,
you can be the bait!

What's wrong with you?! You delirious or something? Calm
down and think that through.

Well, we gotta do somethin'... Okay. Tell ya what. I'll let
ya take the lead on this one.

Go take down that PlatinumNumemon! I wanna see ya make the
most of this opportunity.
Y-Yer actually gonna do it? G-Good luck!

Whoa... You actually beat PlatinumNumemon! You're something
else!

Now, where's that jewelry? I want everybody lookin' high and
low!
I... I found it! The jewelry was hidden under its butt!
Well done, Little Bro! With this jewelry, we'll be—
Wait. Hang on. It's not real jewelry... It's just cut glass.
G-Glass? Master, are you sure?
Ya think I don't know glass when I see it? Ain't no mistake.

Damn it! Where's that jewelry? If we don't find it, our
whole plan's down the drain!
{next}That's disappointing.
{next}What plan?
{next}I'll take the glass.

And after all that hard work! I'm so frustrated, all I wanna
do is eat!

What? Ya wanna hear our plan? Well, it don't concern you,
but we got our reasons, okay?

Ya want these shards of glass? Not a chance. Who knows?
Maybe they're worth somethin'!

*sigh* Well, no amount of whinin' is gonna turn this glass
into jewelry.
Big Bro... Yer givin' up?

I ain't givin' up nothin'! This particular PlatinumNumemon
just turned out to be a bust.
But I'm tired. I say we head back and rest up.

We'll try again some other day. Ya got that, Little Bro?
Solarmon?
Yes, Master!

Where is PlatinumNumemon's jewelry, anyway?
We should try gathering info at the tavern.

Hey there. Got any leads on some sweet treasure
ya wanna share?
{next}I was hoping you'd share some with me.
{next}I'm looking for PlatinumNumemon's jewelry.
{end}Not a one. So long.

I'm not one to give out leads for free, but I can tell ya
about some jewelry I ain't after.

Even after beatin' PlatinumNumemon? Now, that don't seem
right. Tell me the tale.
Okay. So long!

Ah... I see what happened. That weren't PlatinumNumemon ya
defeated.

PlatinumNumemon's platinum-colored. I hear it stays deep in
the sewers, too, so look hard.

It's no easy foe, either. If ya mean to go after it, you'd
best watch yourself.
Another day of workin' hard, keepin' guard!

Master trusted us to keep watch! It's a big job, but I'm
gonna do it right!

Keepin' guard, keepin' guard... Aha! Intruder! Stop right
there!

...Oh, it's just you. We're busy keepin' watch over the
town. Leave us alone!
{next}I brought some jewelry.
{next}What sort of jewelry were you looking for?
{next}Okay. I'll take this jewelry and leave, then.

What? Ya really gonna lie to me like that? There's no
jewelry around... here...

It's real sparkly and beautiful. About the same size as what
you've... got there...

Yeah, get out of here with yer jewelry! Wait... Jewelry?
H-Hold on! Let me see that!
*gulp*
*gulp*

...That's the real deal! I don't believe it! Where'd ya find
that?
{next}Around.
{next}You know, over there.
{next}Not far.
Around where?! Oh, forget it. I don't care anymore!

Oh, right, over there. Wait. That don't mean nothin'! Oh,
forget it. I don't care anymore!

What's that mean?! Would ya stop clownin' around? Oh, forget
it. I don't care anymore!
So... about that jewelry, yer givin' it to us, right?

What? Ya had to work hard for it?! Gaaah! Fine. I'll trade
ya for it!

I'll trade with ya if ya insist. I'll even let ya have what
we got stashed away special.
But, Big Bro! We're gonna need that to go—!
Pipe down, Little Bro. Now, what do ya say?
{next}Okay. I'll trade it.
{next}I'll let you have it for free.

All right. Ya got yerself a deal. I'll trade ya fer that
jewelry.
Wait... What'd ya just say? Yer givin' it to us... fer free?

Th-This ain't some sorta trick, is it? Free means free?
Gratis?

Ya just may be the best person ever! Ya got my respect.
Thanks so much!

Okay. We did all we needed to here. Little Bro, let's head
over to Blimpmon.
We can finally go on our trip, Big Bro!

That's right... We're headin' out right away! Let's go,
Little Bro!
You got it, Big Bro!

Oh... and lemme thank ya for all yer help, too. Here. Take
this!

Hello there. Long time, no see. Remember me?
I used to be Solarmon under Master Bearmon.

*sniff, sniff* Oh, my. You smell of several different time
periods.

Did you journey across time? Hehe. I feel it might be
possible for someone like you.

Oh, it's you again. Lemme guess. Ya wanna hear what we have
to say?
{next}Yes, please tell me more.
{end}Sorry. I'm busy right now. Maybe some other time.

I suppose yer feelin' pretty worthless at the moment, eh?
Okay, I'll fill ya in.

Aww, and here I was gonna give ya a break. Well, hurry back
when yer done!
